my only and hybrid strategies.

Alex invests through a single lens that he has refined over 20 years.
He looks for technology-esque curves, durable competitive advantages,
and underappreciated earnings power.
This conversation is a tour through how he applies that framework today.
We start with this highest conviction position, which is anthropic,

Please enjoy my conversation with Alex Sackerdote.
